subscriptions.name: Claude Pro (Max)
subscriptions.businessPurpose: Primary AI assistant — Claude Code, content creation, coding, business ops
subscriptions.notes: Powers entire ACOS system, Claude Code, all development. Non-negotiable.

subscriptions.name: ChatGPT Plus
subscriptions.businessPurpose: Secondary AI — GPT-4o for comparison, DALL-E, voice mode, browsing
subscriptions.notes: Useful for second opinion, image gen, voice conversations. Could downgrade if budget tight.

subscriptions.name: Google One AI Premium
subscriptions.businessPurpose: Gemini Pro, 2TB Google storage, NotebookLM, Gemini in Workspace
subscriptions.notes: 2TB storage is valuable standalone. Gemini for image gen (nano banana uses it). NotebookLM for research.
subscriptions.costOptimization: Keep — 2TB storage alone worth it. Nano Banana image gen depends on Gemini API.

subscriptions.name: Revolut Premium
subscriptions.businessPurpose: Personal banking, Perplexity Pro included, currency exchange, travel insurance
subscriptions.notes: Perplexity Pro alone is worth €20/mo. Currency exchange for international purchases. Travel insurance for Japan trip.
subscriptions.costOptimization: Excellent value — Perplexity Pro + banking + insurance for €20.

subscriptions.name: Vercel Pro
subscriptions.businessPurpose: frankx.ai hosting, Vercel Blob storage, Analytics, Edge Functions
subscriptions.notes: Hosts production website. Blob stores music MP3s + product PDFs. Non-negotiable.

subscriptions.name: Supabase Pro
subscriptions.businessPurpose: Database, auth, storage for future SaaS products
subscriptions.notes: Currently underutilized. Needed for ACOS Cloud / SaaS products. Consider downgrading to free tier until SaaS launches.

subscriptions.name: Railway
subscriptions.notes: Hosts all n8n automation workflows. 9 active workflows. Very cost-effective.

subscriptions.name: Cursor Pro
subscriptions.notes: Useful but overlaps heavily with Claude Code CLI. Consider canceling if Claude Code covers all needs.

subscriptions.name: GitHub Pro
subscriptions.businessPurpose: Private repos, GitHub Actions, code hosting
subscriptions.notes: Hosts all code. Private repos essential for BV IP protection.

subscriptions.name: Suno Pro
subscriptions.businessPurpose: AI music generation — 12,000+ tracks, commercial licensing
subscriptions.notes: Core creative tool. Commercial license for selling/licensing music.

apis.name: OpenRouter
apis.purpose: Multi-model API access for n8n workflows and automation

apis.name: Resend
apis.purpose: Transactional email — newsletter, product delivery, sequences

apis.name: Nano Banana (Gemini Image)
apis.purpose: Image generation via Gemini Flash — blog heroes, product images

pendingEvaluation.name: Perplexity Computer
pendingEvaluation.verdict: SKIP — Claude Coworker (included in Max) provides same browser automation. Use Playwright MCP instead for free.
pendingEvaluation.reasoning: You already have: (1) Claude Code with Playwright MCP for browser automation, (2) Claude Max which includes Coworker mode, (3) Perplexity Pro via Revolut for research. Adding Perplexity Computer would be redundant.

pendingEvaluation.name: Paddle (MoR)
pendingEvaluation.verdict: ADD when first product ships — handles all EU VAT
pendingEvaluation.reasoning: No monthly fee. Only pay per transaction. Eliminates VAT filing for digital sales.

pendingEvaluation.name: Moneybird
pendingEvaluation.reasoning: Required for BV bookkeeping. €28/mo for 50 transactions.
